title: Pilot Readiness Review / Release Cut

completed_gates.title: PostgreSQL Audit Immutability CI Gate
completed_gates.description: Real PostgreSQL integration test proving GL-108 audit log triggers block UPDATE and DELETE; prevents silent regression on the immutability guarantee.

completed_gates.title: Structured Logging Integration
completed_gates.description: server.py request handlers emit structured log events for operational and security events without changing API behavior or auth semantics.

completed_gates.title: Correlation ID Propagation Baseline
completed_gates.description: X-Correlation-ID is echoed in all responses and appears in structured log events; unsafe or oversized IDs are replaced rather than reflected.

completed_gates.title: Operator Token Expiry and Rotation Baseline
completed_gates.description: Operator tokens expire and support rotation without leaking raw token material; fail-closed on expiry.

completed_gates.title: Auth Failure Structured Event Logging
completed_gates.description: All auth failure paths emit structured security events with a stable reason_code field and correlation_id; no raw token or header leakage.

completed_gates.title: Full Backend Suite Timeout Wrapper
completed_gates.description: scripts/run-full-backend-suite.sh wraps the full suite with a configurable timeout (default 900 s) and preserves exit codes.

completed_gates.title: PostgreSQL Connection Pooling Baseline
completed_gates.description: psycopg2 SimpleConnectionPool with configurable min/max connections; SQLite path unchanged; credentials never exposed in failure messages.

completed_gates.title: Request Payload Shape Validation Gate
completed_gates.description: Oversized, malformed, wrong-shape, and non-object JSON bodies are rejected with safe error responses; raw payload is never echoed.

completed_gates.title: Operational Smoke Test Bundle
completed_gates.description: Fast, focused validation suite for post-deployment confidence: health, auth boundary, payload validation, correlation ID, and logging safety.

completed_gates.title: Production Runtime Gate
completed_gates.description: Fast config validation before deployment covering runtime mode classification, production-like config safety, and secret-handling conventions.

completed_gates.title: Backup / Restore Minimum Drill
completed_gates.description: Checklist and validation package for minimum backup/restore readiness; defines critical data categories, restore acceptance criteria, and go/no-go gates.

pilot_ready_capabilities: Product Core backend: grant lifecycle (submit, approve, execute, evidence, audit) end-to-end
Auth and operator boundaries: tokens, expiry, rotation, challenge flow
Request validation: payload shape, size limits, JSON structure, string length
Structured logging and correlation: all handlers emit structured events with correlation_id
Auth failure security logging: stable reason_code, no raw token leakage
Production runtime gate: fast automated config validation before deployment
Operational smoke tests: focused post-deployment health and boundary validation
Backup/restore minimum drill: critical data categories and restore acceptance criteria
PostgreSQL readiness baseline: audit immutability CI-gated; connection pooling configurable
Audit and hash-chain integrity: row_hash, prev_hash, PostgreSQL UPDATE/DELETE blocking
accepted_pilot_caveats: Controlled environment only: not a public production deployment
Limited named users and operators: pilot scope is not open-ended or multi-tenant
Manual operator oversight: no automated incident response or alerting during pilot
Manual deployment and runbook steps: no automated CI/CD deployment pipeline
Manual full-suite gate: the full backend suite must be run manually before each deployment
Backup/restore is minimum package only: no automated backup scheduling or cloud snapshot management
Monitoring and alerting not complete: no metrics pipeline or alerting thresholds (production SaaS blocker)
production_saas_blockers: Monitoring and alerting baseline: no metrics pipeline, health alerting, or latency dashboards (GL-129)
Incident response runbook execution gate: escalation procedures not defined or tested (GL-130)
Tenant and workspace boundary: no multi-tenant architecture or tenant isolation design (GL-132)
Production deployment automation or explicit ops procedure: no containers, orchestration, or automated pipeline (GL-131)
External security review: no third-party or independent security review completed (GL-133)
Legal, privacy, and data-retention review: no data classification matrix or evidence retention policy
Customer onboarding, admin UX, and commercial packaging: no customer-facing onboarding or billing structure
go_criteria: scripts/run-full-backend-suite.sh passes with 0 failures and 0 errors
Secrets configured via environment variables or secrets manager: no raw secrets in files, logs, or docs
Pilot operators are named and have accepted operational responsibility
Rollback and restore path is documented and known before deployment begins
no_go_criteria: Any failure or error in the full backend suite
Any failure in the production runtime gate
Any failure in the operational smoke tests
Any failure in the backup/restore drill
Unsafe or missing secrets configuration (raw secrets in files, missing required env vars)
Any audit log or hash-chain integrity issue detected
Operational responsibility for the pilot is unowned or unacknowledged

recommended_next_issues.title: Incident Response / Operational Runbook Execution Gate

explicit_non_goals: No database migration or schema changes
No dependency additions or version changes
No frontend, website, design, brand, or marketing file changes
